name: misa77
desc: Ridiculously fast decompression at good ratios. misa77 is 1.5-3x faster than LZ4 for decompression on x86 and ARM (with better ratios!).
descFull: Ridiculously fast decompression at good ratios. misa77 is 1.5-3x faster than LZ4 for decompression on x86 and ARM (with better ratios!).

hnPosts.title: Show HN: misa77 - a codec that decodes 2x faster than LZ4 (at better ratios)
